Aeon Flux (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,857,987Details
International Box Office $28,055,586
Worldwide Box Office $53,913,573
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $22,281,522
Total $22,281,522
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,661,112 (49.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,608 opening theaters/2,608 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,210,245

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 2nd, 2005 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: April 25th, 2006 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and sexual content
Running Time: 92 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, Visual Effects
Plot point: Cloning, Death of a Sibling, Femme Fatale, Government Corruption, Human Experimentation, Infertility, Political, Research Scientist, Secret Agent, Surprise Twist
Social setting: Dystopia, Epidemic, Secret Societies
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Cyberpunk
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: MTV Films, Lakeshore Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
